scenario_name: Scenario 11 — Floating Point in Financial Calculation
justification: All rubric criteria met: floating-point identified as Critical with bank transfer context emphasized; specific numerical example provided (100 deliveries at $0.10); fix recommends integer cents or Decimal/BigNumber library; NaN propagation from null/undefined fields noted as Important issue; safe_to_deploy is false; severity distinction from display-only context is clear throughout (repeated emphasis on 'real money', 'irreversible bank transfers').

observations.text: Floating-point issue correctly rated Critical with clear reasoning about why bank transfers make this higher severity than display-only
Concrete reproduction example with arithmetic showing cent-level drift
Fix correctly specifies integer cents arithmetic and Decimal/BigNumber as alternatives
NaN propagation from null/undefined delivery fields identified with appropriate severity
safe_to_deploy is false with strong justification about irreversibility of bank transfers
Goes beyond rubric requirements — identifies negative payout, idempotency, and rounding issues that are genuinely relevant to financial code
Excellent production readiness assessment noting bank transfers cannot be rolled back
